scripts.clean:generated: rm -f view/vite.config.js view/vite.config.d.ts view/tailwind.config.js view/tailwind.config.d.ts view/tsconfig.node.tsbuildinfo view/tsconfig.app.tsbuildinfo
scripts.deps:go: go mod tidy && go mod download
scripts.predev: npm run clean:generated && npm run deps:go
scripts.prebuild: npm run clean:generated && npm run deps:go
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace attendance-repository-view && mkdir -p bin && go build -o bin/attendance .
scripts.format:go: gofmt -w main.go config/*.go controller/*.go database/*.go database/redis/*.go middleware/*.go model/*.go service/*.go
scripts.format: npm run format:go && npm run format --workspace attendance-repository-view
scripts.lint: go vet ./... && npm run lint --workspace attendance-repository-view
